name: eidos
description: Turn docket tasks into tracked, evidenced Eidos loops with `eidos do`, then route, verify, and learn from the work.

interface.shortDescription: Make work accountable: orient, run `eidos do`, verify evidence, and learn.
interface.longDescription: Eidos turns a vague or docketed task into a tracked, evidenced loop. Use it to orient with `eidos guide/status/health`, execute docket work with `eidos do <task-id>`, continue with evidence verification, capture the praxis learning, and route specialist work to Rhea, Foreman, Reeves, Surfari, Forge-Forge, or Felix only when needed. The plugin does not do the work itself; it starts and closes the loop around the work.
defaultPrompt: Start the Eidos loop for TASK-1234.
Check this eidos before we work.
Route this task to the right specialist.
